creator: ports@thelanman.net
text:
Created attachment 186577
poudriere build log

I have a couple of poudriere build sets. All are on FreeBSD 11.1-p1 and the 2 with InnoDB enabled fail to build with the error:

sql/sql_digest.cc:42:10: fatal error: 'lex_token.h' file not found
#include "lex_token.h"
         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
ninja: build stopped: subcommand failed.


Full poudriere log attached. Seemed to work fine with the 10.1.26 port from August, but not sure what else changed regarding dependencies.
